mapper.select: select tpm.write_year , tpm.doc_type , tpm.doc_no , tpm.comp_id , tpm.orgn_id , (select orgn_nm from esg.tb_orgn_info toi where orgn_id= tpm.orgn_id) as orgn_nm , tpm.receipt_dt , tpm.ppe_id , tdp.ppe_nm , tdp.provision_standard , tdp.provision_target , (tpm.store_qty - tpm.in_qty + tpm.out_qty ) as last_store_qty , tpm.in_qty , tpm.out_qty , tpm.store_qty , tpm.remark , tpm.created_at , tpm.created_by , tpm.updated_at , tpm.updated_by , case when (select write_year || doc_no from esg.tb_ppe_manage where ppe_id = tpm.ppe_id order by write_year desc, doc_no desc limit 1) = (tpm.write_year || tpm.doc_no) then 'Y' else 'N' end islast from esg.tb_ppe_manage tpm join esg.tb_ppe_items tdp on tpm.ppe_id = tdp.ppe_id and tpm.comp_id = tdp.comp_id where tpm.comp_id = #{compId} and tpm.ppe_id = #{ppeId} and tpm.write_year = #{writeYear} and SUBSTRING(TPM.RECEIPT_DT,0,7) = #{receiptMonth} order by doc_no desc
mapper.insert:
SELECT case when max(doc_no) is null then '00001' else LPAD(CAST(max(doc_no)::BIGINT +1 as TEXT),5,'0') end as doc_no FROM esg.tb_ppe_manage where write_year = SUBSTRING(#{receiptDt}, 1, 4)
INSERT INTO esg.tb_ppe_manage ( write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id, ppe_id, orgn_id, receipt_dt, in_qty, out_qty, store_qty, remark, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( SUBSTRING(#{receiptDt}, 1, 4), 'PPE', #{docNo}, #{compId}, #{ppeId}, #{orgnId}, #{receiptDt}, #{inQty}, #{outQty}, #{storeQty}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select:
WITH PPE_DATA AS ( SELECT ppe_id, in_qty, out_qty, store_qty, (store_qty - in_qty + out_qty) AS last_store_qty, orgn_id, receipt_dt, write_year, doc_type, doc_no, comp_id FROM esg.tb_ppe_manage WHERE receipt_dt LIKE #{writeYear} || #{receiptMonth} || '%' AND ppe_id = #{ppeId} ) SELECT ppe_nm, COALESCE(receipt_dt, FIRST_VALUE(receipt_dt) OVER ()) AS receipt_dt, ordseq, gubun, COALESCE(CAST(qty AS varchar), '') AS qty, COALESCE(orgn_nm, FIRST_VALUE(orgn_nm) OVER ()) AS orgn_nm, COALESCE(manager_nm, FIRST_VALUE(manager_nm) OVER ()) AS manager_nm, signature, doc_no, ppe_id, ord AS ppeOrd FROM ( SELECT ppe_nm, receipt_dt, ordseq, ord, gubun, qty, orgn_nm || ' / ' || result_cnt || '명' AS orgn_nm, manager_nm, signature, doc_no, ppe_id FROM ( -- 입고 SELECT ppe_nm, receipt_dt, ordSeq, gubun, SUM(qty) AS qty, orgn_nm, manager_nm, signature, MAX(doc_no) AS doc_no, ppe_id, ord, result_cnt FROM ( SELECT A.ppe_nm, SUBSTRING(B.receipt_dt,5,2) || '월 ' || SUBSTRING(B.receipt_dt,7,2) || '일' AS receipt_dt, 1 AS ordSeq, '입고' AS gubun, B.in_qty AS qty, (SELECT orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info toi WHERE orgn_id = B.orgn_id) AS orgn_nm, (SELECT thi.hr_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tai ON thi.hr_id = tai.hr_id AND tai.target_type = 'PPE' AND tai.target_id = (B.write_year || B.doc_no || B.ppe_id) LIMIT 1) AS manager_nm, (SELECT tai.signature FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.hr_id = tai.hr_id WHERE tai.target_type = 'PPE' AND tai.target_id = (B.write_year || B.doc_no || B.ppe_id) LIMIT 1) AS signature, B.doc_no, A.ppe_id, A.ord_seq AS ord, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi WHERE thi.orgn_id = B.orgn_id) AS result_cnt FROM ESG.tb_ppe_items A FULL OUTER JOIN PPE_DATA B ON A.ppe_id = B.ppe_id AND A.comp_id = B.comp_id WHERE A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.ppe_id = #{ppeId} ) intable GROUP BY ppe_nm, receipt_dt, ordSeq, gubun, orgn_nm, manager_nm, signature, ppe_id, ord, result_cnt, doc_no
UNION ALL
-- 지급 SELECT ppe_nm, receipt_dt, ordSeq, gubun, SUM(qty) AS qty, orgn_nm, manager_nm, signature, MAX(doc_no) AS doc_no, ppe_id, ord, result_cnt FROM ( SELECT A.ppe_nm, SUBSTRING(B.receipt_dt,5,2) || '월 ' || SUBSTRING(B.receipt_dt,7,2) || '일' AS receipt_dt, 2 AS ordSeq, '지급' AS gubun, B.out_qty AS qty, (SELECT orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info toi WHERE orgn_id = B.orgn_id) AS orgn_nm, (SELECT thi.hr_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tai ON thi.hr_id = tai.hr_id AND tai.target_type = 'PPE' AND tai.target_id = (B.write_year || B.doc_no || B.ppe_id) LIMIT 1) AS manager_nm, (SELECT tai.signature FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.hr_id = tai.hr_id WHERE tai.target_type = 'PPE' AND tai.target_id = (B.write_year || B.doc_no || B.ppe_id) LIMIT 1) AS signature, B.doc_no, A.ppe_id, A.ord_seq AS ord, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi WHERE thi.orgn_id = B.orgn_id) AS result_cnt FROM ESG.tb_ppe_items A FULL OUTER JOIN PPE_DATA B ON A.ppe_id = B.ppe_id AND A.comp_id = B.comp_id WHERE A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.ppe_id = #{ppeId} ) outtable GROUP BY ppe_nm, receipt_dt, ordSeq, gubun, orgn_nm, manager_nm, signature, ppe_id, ord, result_cnt, doc_no
UNION ALL
-- 현재고 -- SELECT DISTINCT ON (ppe_nm, receipt_dt, orgn_nm, manager_nm) * SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.ppe_nm, SUBSTRING(B.receipt_dt,5,2) || '월 ' || SUBSTRING(B.receipt_dt,7,2) || '일' AS receipt_dt, 3 AS ordSeq, '현재고' AS gubun, (FIRST_VALUE(B.last_store_qty) OVER ( PARTITION BY B.ppe_id, B.orgn_id ORDER BY B.doc_no ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING ) + SUM(COALESCE(B.in_qty,0) - COALESCE(B.out_qty,0)) OVER ( PARTITION BY B.ppe_id, B.orgn_id ORDER BY B.doc_no ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW )) AS qty, (SELECT orgn_nm FROM esg.tb_orgn_info toi WHERE orgn_id = B.orgn_id) AS orgn_nm, (SELECT thi.hr_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi JOIN esg.tb_approval_info tai ON thi.hr_id = tai.hr_id AND tai.target_type = 'PPE' AND tai.target_id = (B.write_year || B.doc_no || B.ppe_id) LIMIT 1) AS manager_nm, (SELECT tai.signature FROM esg.tb_approval_info tai JOIN esg.tb_hr_info thi ON thi.hr_id = tai.hr_id WHERE tai.target_type = 'PPE' AND tai.target_id = (B.write_year || B.doc_no || B.ppe_id) LIMIT 1) AS signature, B.doc_no, A.ppe_id, A.ord_seq AS ord, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM esg.tb_hr_info thi WHERE thi.orgn_id = B.orgn_id) AS result_cnt FROM ESG.tb_ppe_items A FULL OUTER JOIN PPE_DATA B ON A.ppe_id = B.ppe_id AND A.comp_id = B.comp_id WHERE A.use_yn = 'Y' AND A.ppe_id = #{ppeId} ) nowtable ORDER BY ppe_nm, orgn_nm, manager_nm, receipt_dt DESC ) t1 ORDER BY receipt_dt DESC NULLS LAST, ppe_id, doc_no DESC, ordSeq ASC ) t ORDER BY ord;

select tdp.* , (select MAX(receipt_dt) from esg.tb_ppe_manage where comp_id = #{compId} and ppe_id = tdp.ppe_id) as last_receipt_dt , (select store_qty from esg.tb_ppe_manage where comp_id = #{compId} and ppe_id = tdp.ppe_id order by write_year desc, doc_no desc limit 1) as store_qty from esg.tb_ppe_items tdp where comp_id = #{compId} order by ord_seq

select tdp.* , (select MAX(receipt_dt) from esg.tb_ppe_manage where comp_id = #{compId} and ppe_id = tdp.ppe_id) as last_receipt_dt , (select store_qty from esg.tb_ppe_manage where comp_id = #{compId} and ppe_id = tdp.ppe_id order by write_year desc, doc_no desc limit 1) as store_qty from esg.tb_ppe_items tdp where comp_id = #{compId} and use_yn = 'Y' order by ord_seq
mapper.insert:
SELECT TO_CHAR(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || lpad((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(ppe_id from 9 for 4))::int, 0) + 1)::text , 4, '0') as ppe_id FROM esg.tb_ppe_items WHERE ppe_id like to_char(now(), 'yyyymmdd') || '%'
INSERT INTO esg.tb_ppe_items ( comp_id, ppe_id, ppe_nm, provision_standard, provision_target, use_yn, ord_seq, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{compId}, #{ppeId}, #{ppeNm}, #{provisionStandard}, #{provisionTarget}, #{useYn}, #{ordSeq}, now(), #{createdBy} )
